title: Heaven
questions: What springs to mind when you hear the word 'heaven'?
Do you think anyone can go to heaven?
Is there just one heaven or a different one for different religions?
What aspects of heaven are here on Earth?
What colours, smells, tastes and sights will be in heaven?
What are the biggest differences between heaven and Earth?
What will you miss most about Earth in heaven?
What do you think a guide book to heaven would contain?
What language do you think is spoken in heaven?
Do you think there'll be computers and the Internet in heaven?
Do you think you'll go to heaven?
What do you think heaven looks like?
What do you think you'll look like in heaven?
Do you think there'll be anything boring about being in heaven?
What do you think people do every day in heaven?
Do you think we continue relationships in heaven?
What kind of heavenly bodies (angels, gods...) do you think we'll meet in heaven?
What emotions will we leave behind once we get to heaven and what new emotions will we encounter?
Do you think there are rules in heaven?
Will we remember Earth or be able to look down on Earth once we're in heaven?
